title: I let Claude Code take my job (it did better than me)
summary: A developer tested Claude Code (Anthropic's coding assistant) on their own job tasks and reported that the AI performed better than manual work in some cases. The video explores workflow efficiency, terminal interactions, and raises questions about AI replacing software engineers.
